item.title: My bank account was empty, but now I'm filled with remorse.
item.description: I had just bought a house so I didn't have a lot of money left to my name. I noticed something off about his behaviour, and when I confronted him about it, he came clean to me. He slipped me 2000 dollars to keep my mouth shut. I needed that money for water and electricity. I always thought she would figure out what kind of a player he was anyway. Things got worse and worse, and somehow it even landed his wife in jail. He actually charged her too much when she landed on Virginia Avenue as well. It's true, monopoly ruins relationships. Front page! Send fetishes
item.dc:creator: IhaveWAYtoomanyfetishes

item.title: After years of struggling with Depression, Anxiety, Trichotillomania, and OCD, I wrote a poetry book about it :’)
item.description: #poetry #mental_health #anxiety
item.dc:creator: chloecreating

item.title: Why does this judge ask such stupid questions?
item.description: I made a meme. I don't know if it's been done already, but hopefully not. Edit: I wrote judge in the headline. I meant lawyer. And I can't figure out how to fix it without deleting the whole thing. And everyone has been commenting and having discussions, so I didn't want to do that. Sorry about that folks!
item.dc:creator: lovelyweirdodancer

item.title: Why am I not surprised?
item.description: Last time I posted this, the fanboys tried hard to bury it under downvotes. So I will simply post it again! Frontpage Update! For all those who are talking about 'did he or did he not', here is the fantastical Source! https://www.snopes.com/news/2022/04/26/elon-musk-hunger/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Don't get me wrong, some of my best friends are straight
item.description: I’m not against their lifestyles I just wish they’d stop shoving it down our throats.
item.dc:creator: ButtBot9900

item.title: Dark Souls tribute by UndeadChestnut
item.description: This beautiful comic by Undeadchestnut is her "personal farewell to a game series that has managed to captivate and move me like no other." I found it back in 2018 somewhere here on the internet and it's sat in the recesses of my phone since then. I thought maybe those of you who've yet to see it would appreciate such a well drawn and soulful comic. Credit to the artist, as always: https://undeadchestnut.tumblr.com/ https://twitter.com/undeadchestnut The post itself: https://undeadchestnut.tumblr.com/post/162989776302/i-finally-finished-it-is-dark-souls-even-relevant Hope you all have a lovely rest of your week, stay safe and be kind.
item.dc:creator: Artyom21

item.title: Dads sign up for class to learn how to braid their daughters hair..... and drink beers.

item.title: This is the way to win the lottery
item.description:
£30, £40, £50 plus million is way more than anyone needs, so good on her for giving over half her winnings away.
Looks like she was a good person before she won, and this gave her an opportunity to do even more good.
"Money liberates you to be the person that you want to be." Now that is a healthy attitude
Bella the cockapoo tax Sauce: https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/uk-england-tees-61241436 Most Viral Edit: Oh gosh! If you see this and it's inspired you, then please consider supporting community groups in your local area. Or the one in my local area. Urban Outreach feed hundreds of poorer families each year, provide support for care leavers and help ex-prisoners settle back into the community. https://www.urbanoutreach.co.uk/
item.dc:creator: BorussiMunchkinFlapjack

item.title: Day 334: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: La Lolita 180g Beef Patty, Blue Cheese, Arugula, Caramelized Onion, Tomato From Mu. Burgerhouse In Playa del Carmen, Mexico Thank You @ForTheLoveOfPineapple For This Burger Submission! 12/10 Previous Day 333: https://imgur.com/gallery/qfyp64D MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: Ugh this guy
item.description: Well what do you know
item.dc:creator: oceanflyer

item.title: I miss my friends
item.description: Sad little 1st world problems incoming... But I miss my friends, who I've never actually met in real life, but some of whom, I'd known and gamed with for almost 20yrs now. Some used to hangout in video chats outside of steam, others I was involved with within a gaming community clan. Some went missing and have never been heard from again and no one knows what happened to them, Over the years I've asked and tried to reach out to others. But no one responds or knows if they're even alive any more. Last time I saw/spoke with 2 of them was 10 and 11yrs ago. I miss them... but I hope that they are well, happy and enjoying life and have just found those things that were far more important to them.
item.dc:creator: anomnomnomaly

item.title: Every accusation a confession. Who is indoctrinating who now?
item.description:
The note included candy and no word yet on what was on the DVD.
This person wouldn't know biological truth if it was a rattlesnake and bit them in the ass. Update from OP: The DVD mentioned was not actually sent, and the candy was a Toblerone.
item.dc:creator: Cryolith
